sections.map_intro: Browse every Dubai project in real time. Pan, zoom, and click on listings to see pricing, availability, and project details without leaving the page.

live.title: Live project overlays

filters.title: Filters built for buyers
filters.body: Filter by price bands, handover dates, or developer type in seconds.

workflows.title: Shortlist and handoff
workflows.body: Open a project, copy a shareable link, or hand it to our advisors for next steps.

steps: Zoom into the area you care about and tap a cluster.
Open a project card to see pricing, unit mix, and the developer.
Copy the link or tap contact to speak with an advisor.

sections.disclaimer_intro_1: A2 Properties provides real estate brokerage, advisory, and property marketing services in Dubai and across the UAE.
sections.disclaimer_intro_2: Property details, prices, availability, payment plans, and market information are provided for general guidance and may change without prior notice.
sections.disclaimer_simulated_body: All listings, project information, floor plans, images, maps, and availability shown on this website are subject to developer, seller, landlord, and market updates. A2 Properties makes reasonable efforts to keep information accurate but does not guarantee that every detail is complete or current.
sections.disclaimer_no_investment_body: Content on this website is provided for informational purposes only and should not be treated as legal, tax, mortgage, or financial advice. Buyers, sellers, tenants, and investors should obtain independent professional advice before making a decision.
sections.disclaimer_no_investment_list1: Prices, rental yields, service charges, fees, and payment plans may change without notice.
sections.disclaimer_no_investment_list2: Projected returns, market trends, and area insights are estimates and are not guaranteed.
sections.disclaimer_no_investment_list3: Final terms are subject to signed agreements, due diligence, and applicable UAE laws and regulations.
sections.disclaimer_risk_body: Real estate transactions involve market, liquidity, financing, currency, regulatory, and handover risks. Past market performance or rental income does not guarantee future results.
sections.disclaimer_corporate_body: A2 Properties may share information received from developers, listing owners, agents, portals, and other third parties. External offers, incentives, and promotions remain subject to the relevant provider's terms and availability.
sections.disclaimer_restrictions: Availability of properties and services may depend on eligibility, documentation, jurisdiction, developer approval, and regulatory requirements.
sections.disclaimer_related_heading: For official confirmation, contact an A2 Properties advisor before proceeding:

sections.faq_title: Explore Our FAQs for Quick Answers
sections.faq_subtitle: Have a question? Here are the most frequently asked questions and their answers.

faq_1.q: Find projects tailored to your goals/budget in seconds
faq_1.a: Tell us your goals and budget and we will surface options instantly, so you can move forward confidently.

faq_2.q: How quickly can I get matched?
faq_2.a: Most users receive curated matches in under a minute after sharing a few preferences.

faq_3.q: Do I need to commit right away?
faq_3.a: No. Explore as long as you like and shortlist favorites before engaging further.

faq_4.q: Can I speak to a human?
faq_4.a: Absolutely. Our advisors are available 24/7 to answer questions and guide you.

faq_5.q: Is there a cost to get started?
faq_5.a: Browsing and shortlisting is free. Only pay when you move forward with a selection.

faq_6.a: Listings are refreshed daily so you always see the latest availability and pricing.

sections.trusted_worldwide_subheading: Trusted by real estate buyers and global investors worldwide.
sections.trusted_worldwide_note: Fast and reliable — zero delays in closing.
